Recommended jobs and account navigation should be ignored

Frontend Platform Engineer

Northstar Analytics
Austin, TX
$120,000 - $160,000 a year

Northstar Analytics helps operations teams understand product usage and customer outcomes. We are looking for a Frontend Platform Engineer to improve our React and TypeScript application shell, design reusable components, and make our dashboard fast for large workspaces.

You will collaborate with backend engineers on REST and GraphQL API contracts, own testing patterns, and help migrate legacy modules to Next.js. Experience with accessibility, performance profiling, CI/CD, and design systems is strongly preferred.

  • Must have 5+ years of experience with React, TypeScript, JavaScript, and modern frontend tooling.
  • Strong knowledge of API integration, GitHub Actions, Docker, and product engineering practices is required.
  • This is a full-time hybrid role with remote flexibility.
Senior React Engineer Pioneer Apps Denver, CO $130,000 - $170,000 a year
Design Systems Engineer Atlas UI Remote $115,000 - $150,000 a year
